meaning: n.乌贼,乌贼属,乌贼的墨,颜料,棕褐色adj.乌贼墨色的,使用乌贼墨颜料的
examples: The walls are hung with sepia photographs of old school heroes.
Labels are often handwritten in sepia ink and many display cases also appear to be original.
Effects include dissolves, mirror image, sepia, iris effects, fades, TV-shop and many more.
And really, who wouldn't want to see 807 sepia-infused 1:1 shots of Usain Bolt?
The real, interactive overlay comes complete with sepia-tinged Street View images and a detailed backstory.
